ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequencing_runs" (
  "run_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sequencing run */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequencing run was released */,
  "load_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequencing run was loaded into the system */,
  "spots" INTEGER /* Number of spots in the sequencing run */,
  "bases" INTEGER /* Number of bases in the sequencing run */,
  "spots_with_mates" INTEGER /* Number of spots with mates in the sequencing run */,
  "avg_length" INTEGER /* Average length of the sequences in the run */,
  "size_MB" REAL /* Size of the sequencing run data in MB */,
  "assembly_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly */,
  "download_path" TEXT /* URL to download the sequencing run data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the run */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library used in the sequencing run */,
  "sequencer_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the sequencer used */,
  "sequencing_center" TEXT /* Name of the sequencing center */,
  "sequencing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequencing was performed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sequencing run */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the sequencing run */,
  "reference_genome" TEXT /* Reference genome used for alignment */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the data analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_library_name FOREIGN KEY ("library_name") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_assembly_name FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_name") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the library was prepared */,
  "library_type" TEXT /* Type of library */,
  "preparation_date" TEXT /* Date when the library was prepared */,
  "preparation_method" TEXT /* Method used for library preparation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly */,
  "assembly_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assembly */,
  "assembly_date" TEXT /* Date when the assembly was generated */,
  "assembly_method" TEXT /* Method used for assembly */,
  "assembly_quality" TEXT /* Quality metrics of the assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" TEXT /* ID of the sequencing run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequencing run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequencing run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES sequencing_runs ("run_id")
)
